intent: Model a salary-funded household with predictable cash inflows and consistent monthly obligations.
expectedEvaluatorBehavior: Evaluator should show low volatility, high budget adherence, and minimal degradation flags across checks.
customerProfileSummary: Salary-earner profile with consistent checking buffer and recurring essentials.
whatToLookFor: Steady cash pressure, stable budget utilization, and low subscription concentration.
realWorldPattern: Regular payroll cadence with steady recurring expenses.
sanitizedNotice: Synthetic identities, synthetic account IDs, and fabricated merchants only.
